All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApplicationException
 
AttendanceBean
 
AttendanceModel
 
BaseBean
BaseBean is an abstract JavaBean class that serves as the base for all entity beans in the application.
BaseCtl
BaseCtl is an abstract base controller class that extends HttpServlet.
ChangePasswordCtl
ChangePasswordCtl is a Controller class that handles the Change Password functionality for logged-in users.
CollegeBean
CollegeBean is a JavaBean class that represents a College entity.
CollegeCtl
 
CollegeListCtl
CollegeListCtl Servlet handles the operations of displaying, searching, paginating and deleting College records.
CollegeModel
CollegeModel is a Model class that handles database operations for the College entity.
CourseBean
CourseBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Course entity.
CourseCtl
Controller to handle Course operations such as add, update and display.
CourseListCtl
CourseListCtl handles listing, searching, pagination, and deletion of Course records.
CourseModel
CourseModel is a Model class that handles database operations for the Course entity.
DataBaseException
 
DataUtility
 
DataValidator
 
DropdownListBean
 
DuplicateException
 
EmailBuilder
 
EmailMessage
 
EmailUtility
 
FacultyBean
FacultyBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Faculty entity.
FacultyModel
FacultyModel is a Model class that handles database operations related to the Timetable entity for faculty-related queries.
ForgetPasswordCtl
Forget Password Controller.
FrontControler
 
GetMarksheetCtl
Controller to fetch a Marksheet using Roll Number.
GiftcardBean
 
GiftcardModel
 
GymTrainerBean
 
GymTrainerModel
 
HTMLUtility
 
JdbcDataSource
 
LockerBean
 
LockerModel
 
LoginCtl
 
MarksheetBean
MarksheetBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Marksheet entity.
MarksheetCtl
Controller to handle Marksheet operations.
MarksheetListCtl
Controller to handle Marksheet List operations like search, delete, pagination.
MarksheetMeritListCtl
 
MarksheetModel
MarksheetModel is a Model class that handles all database operations for the Marksheet entity.
MyProfileCtl
 
ORSView
 
PropertyReader
 
RecordNotFoundException
 
RevenueBean
 
RevenueModel
 
RoleBean
RoleBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Role entity.
RoleCtl
 
RoleListCtl
 
RoleModel
RoleModel is a Model class that handles all database operations for the Role entity.
ServletUtility
 
StudentBean
StudentBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Student entity.
StudentCtl
 
StudentListCtl
 
StudentModel
StudentModel is a Model class that handles all database operations for the Student entity.
SubjectBean
SubjectBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Subject entity.
SubjectCtl
 
SubjectListCtl
 
SubjectModel
SubjectModel is a Model class that handles all database operations for the Subject entity.

TimetableBean is a JavaBean class that represents a Timetable entity.
